33.reason: This condition incorrectly identifies non-leaf nodes as leaves. A leaf node must have both left and right NULL, not just one of them.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  This condition incorrectly identifies non-leaf nodes as leaves. A leaf node must have both left and right NULL, not just one of them.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  This condition incorrectly identifies non-leaf nodes as leaves. A leaf node must have both left and right NULL, not just one of them.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: condition should be && instead of || to correctly identify leaf nodes where both children are NULL]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  This condition incorrectly prints nodes with only one child as leaves; should use && to require both children NULL.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The condition for a leaf node is incorrect. A leaf node must have BOTH left and right children as NULL. The current condition uses OR, which incorrectly identifies nodes with only one child as leaves. It should be: if(bst->left==NULL && bst->right==NULL)
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The condition for a leaf node is incorrect. A leaf node must have BOTH left and right children as NULL. The current condition uses OR, which identifies nodes with at least one missing child (including internal nodes with only one child) as leaves. It should be `bst->left==NULL && bst->right==NULL`.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition incorrectly identifies nodes with only one child as leaves. A leaf must have both left and right children NULL.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  // This condition incorrectly identifies nodes with only one child as leaf nodes. A leaf node must have both left and right children NULL.
